summary: There is no conclusive evidence supporting specific angle measurements such as 0 degrees in the central region or 45 degrees in the peripheral region of enamel rod hydroxyapatite crystalline arrangement. The overall trend indicates increasing parallelism from inner to outer parts of the tooth, but precise directional angles remain undefined and not reliably documented in current research.
